name: delcam/vertical-blocks
title: DelCam: Content + Vertical Blocks
description: Section with a headline, countdown inset, and numbered process steps. Steps managed directly in the block.

content.default: We move with certainty and respect your time. No re-trades, no surprises. Our process reflects how we will operate as your partner.

default.title: Introductory Conversation
default.content: A confidential, no-pressure discussion about your business, your goals, and whether we're the right fit. We listen first.

default.title: Indication of Interest
default.content: A non-binding letter outlining valuation range and deal structure within 2–3 weeks of receiving financials. No delays, no games.

default.title: Diligence & LOI
default.content: Focused, efficient due diligence with a dedicated team. We aim to be respectful of your time and management bandwidth.

default.title: Close & Partnership
default.content: We close on time, every time. Day one begins a partnership built on trust, transparency, and shared upside.
